Title: Dog Sitter
Description:
DOG SITTER

We, AMFE,  are global experience animators. Living in the space between music, arts, and lifestyle, with culture at the core. We tour, we connect, and we make unforgettable moments happen. 




With extensive global networks, a team of world-class creative pioneers, and a desire to push the boundaries of experience - we are able to facilitate any combination of travel, production & talent imaginable.




Offering lifestyle curation that goes above and beyond the ordinary. From one-off events to touring celebrations. We deliver creative, production, logistics, communication, and transport.




We are looking for an experienced and meticulously organised Dog Sitter to join our team. 




Position Summary: We are looking for a responsible and caring Dog Sitter to provide top-notch care for our clients' furry companions. As a Dog Sitter, you will be responsible for the daily care and supervision of dogs in the owner’s absence, ensuring their safety, happiness, and well-being. This role requires a genuine love for animals, excellent time management skills, and the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently. 




Key Responsibilities:

Provide feeding, watering, and general care according to each dog's specific needs and schedule.
Administer medications or special diets as needed.
Engage in playtime and exercise, including walks, fetch, and other activities suitable for the dog’s breed and energy level.
Monitor dogs for signs of health issues or behavioural changes and report to the pet owner promptly.
Ensure the safety of all dogs under your care by maintaining a secure environment and adhering to leash and harness protocols during walks.
Conduct regular safety checks of all areas where the dogs are kept to prevent escape or injury.
Respond quickly and appropriately to emergencies, such as illness or injury.
Clean up after the dogs, including waste disposal and maintaining a clean and hygienic environment.
Clean and disinfect feeding bowls, bedding, and play areas regularly.
Maintain open communication with pet owners regarding their dog’s status, behaviour, and any issues that arise.
Provide daily updates through text, email, or photos as requested by the pet owner.
Provide transportation to and from veterinary or grooming appointments if required.
Offer additional services such as basic training reinforcement, bathing, or grooming (if qualified and agreed upon).




Requirements will include:




Proven experience as a dog sitter, pet sitter, or similar role.
Genuine love for animals and a strong understanding of dog behaviour and needs.
Ability to handle dogs of various sizes and temperaments.
Basic knowledge of pet first aid and emergency care.
Strong communication and customer service skills.
Reliable, trustworthy, and punctual.
Physical stamina to handle long walks and playful activities.
Flexibility to work various hours, including weekends and holidays.
EU passport holder is mandatory. Flexibility to travel extensively is a key part of this role.
A valid driving licence is desirable.
Available to start immediately.




If you are interested in the position please email leela@amfe.com

Description:
What To Expect
The Tesla Energy Product and Service Engineering team is looking for a passionate and collaborative Product Engineer to support and accelerate the expansion of the global Supercharger network. With a mandate to realize and maintain the industry-leading uptime of the global Supercharger network a successful applicant will apply solid first principles and leverage data analytics collected from our connected systems across the world to proactively find and solve issues with the Supercharger fleet. A successful applicant will work collaboratively across our global teams to diagnose, troubleshoot, document, and train our organization to ensure our customers have the best possible experience.

The Tesla Energy Supercharger Service Engineering team is responsible for the ongoing success of Tesla’s class leading Supercharger Network. We’re looking for a driven, motivated and collaborative applicant to join our international team to help accelerate the world's transition to sustainable transport. As part of the team, you will be enabled to work across the organization to solve problems and ensure the success of our products. Working alongside the Industrial Energy, Residential Energy and Solar Product and Service Engineering teams you’ll leverage cutting edge data and analytics to ensure the best customer experience and fleet availability.

Our world-class teams operate with a non-conventional philosophy of inter-disciplinary collaboration. Each member of the team is expected to challenge and to be challenged, to create, and to innovate. We’re tackling the world’s most difficult and important problems—and we wouldn’t succeed without our shared passion for making the world a better place.

What You'll Do


Troubleshoot and root cause hardware, software and firmware issues of the global Supercharger network
Drive cross-functional efforts and initiatives to implement fleet improvements with the manufacturing, design, field service, technical support teams
Utilize remote data analysis, fleet analytics and first principles insights to solve problems with some lab work and onsite investigations as needed
Work with the wider engineering and manufacturing teams to drive design and manufacturing product improvements in both existing and future products
Provide support on international service cases to minimize fleet downtime
Work with field service and technical support teams to create documentation and training to support field commissioning, service actions, and to ensure consistent and stable global service operations



What You'll Bring


MSc in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering OR demonstrated exceptional skills in related fields with 3 years of experience
Experience with product engineering, reliability engineering, failure analysis, systems test engineering, or product quality engineering
Experience using SQL, Linux based operating systems, Python, and C/C++ or equivalent
Demonstrated ability to work cross-functionally in a collaborative manner across many teams.
Demonstrated data analytics and analysis
Strong engineering fundamentals and intuition, applied to firmware/software/hardware of connected systems
Prior experience troubleshooting electrical, system, firmware, or process failure modes
Excellent oral and written communication skills
The role is based in Amsterdam with some travel to support investigations, product releases and other service actions as needed

Title: E-bike Bezorger
Description:
Job Description

🚴 Exciting news! We're opening a brand-new HUB soon! 🎉

This HUB is not open yet, but we're planning to launch it in mid-August. Apply now and be among the first candidates we'll contact as soon as the HUB opens!

At Peddler, we’re all about eco-friendly deliveries and happy customers! Cruise through our cities on our electric cargo bikes, enjoying the freedom of the city—rain or shine, even in winter. If you love being outdoors, join us at the forefront of the revolution in package delivery, one ride at a time!

What We Offer

🕒 Flexibility: Set your own schedule with fully flexible working hours - you choose your shift! Also benefit from spontaneous shifts if you don’t like to plan ahead.

💰 Earnings: Which is of course what it's all about! For salaried employees, the hourly wage is between €10,00 and €16,19.

📄 Contract: You will start from the beginning with a 0-hour contract with potential to work many hours.

🚴‍♂️ Perks: Experience your city safely and fast with our Peddler bike, rain-proof gear and no need to pay for a gym - your work is your workout!

📱 Support: Get ongoing support and guidance via Whatsapp and phone calls, along with an onboarding session in the Hub on your first day, where you’ll learn everything you need to know about the job.

What You’ll Do


Deliver a wide range of products from local businesses or online shops to customers using our electric cargo bikes.
Ensure timely and accurate deliveries while providing excellent customer service.
Navigate through your routes using our delivery app, making your workday easy to handle, efficient and smooth.
Stay in contact with our Rider Support team and make sure to always be on the right track.


Job requirements

What We’re Looking For


Motivated individuals of 18 years who are proactive and ready to embrace all seasons with enthusiasm.
Comfortable riding an e-bike for single (5 hours) or double shifts (10 hours) and navigating the city streets.
Good communication skills in English or Dutch.
Feel comfortable using a smartphone and navigation system (Google Maps).


Apply Now

Join the Peddler team and be part of our sustainable way of delivering! Are you interested in other options? Please feel free to send us your CV so that we can contact you.

or

Apply with Indeed unavailable

Title: COME JOIN OUR TEAM
Description:
Het aantal uren en werkdagen zijn in overleg.

Je werkt in een sportieve en energieke omgeving waar mensen komen om zich goed te voelen. De sfeer is actief, sociaal en positief. Samen met je collega’s zorg je ervoor dat leden zich welkom en op hun gemak voelen.

Werk je dienst en pak daarna nog een workout mee. Of juist even sporten vóór je begint. Bij ons heb je de vrijheid om je stage en sport slim te combineren.

Wat ga je doen?


Je begeleidt leden volgens het fitcoach programma.
Je verzorgt small group trainingen in de fitness.
Je maakt persoonlijke trainingsschema’s.
Jij controleert en verzorgt de werking van de apparatuur en lost eventuele problemen op.
Je neemt gezondheidstesten en metingen af.
Je houdt de fitness samen met het team netjes en schoon.


Wat krijg je van ons?


Je gaat aan de slag in een bruisende, sportieve omgeving.
Voor of na je dienst nog even sporten of een balletje slaan.
Een gezellig team van collega’s.


Wat is belangrijk?


Je hebt een afgeronde studie CIOS, academie lichamelijke opvoeding of een opleiding via AFN, NL Actief of een andere sportopleiding met minimaal fitness A of B.
Je woont in omgeving Goirle.


Is dit jouw baan?

Dan maken we graag kennis met je! Stuur je motivatie en cv naar Brigit van Thiel via bthiel@clubpellikaan.nl.

Title: Stress Engineer
Description:
You're not just developing mechanical systems — you're helping shape the next era of flight. Every structure you design contributes to a breakthrough that will redefine global transportation. As a Stress Engineer at Destinus, you'll work on the mechanical and structural systems that make subsonic, supersonic, and hypersonic flight possible, collaborating across all engineering disciplines to solve new challenges as they arise.

At Destinus, we are revolutionizing the defense industry with cutting-edge Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). Our innovative technologies are designed to meet the unique demands of modern defense operations, delivering unparalleled speed, precision, and cost effectiveness. Destinus partners with government agencies and defense organizations worldwide to provide advanced solutions for mission-critical operations, enabling a new era of efficiency and technological superiority. Join us in shaping the future of defense with groundbreaking aerospace innovations.


What you'll do

Perform detailed structural and structural/thermal analyses and sizing of aerospace structures, components, and systems
Guide structural optimization and design improvements
Deliver detailed FEM Models used for analysis, from GFEM to detailed analysis
Define sizing loads and load cases required for scoping detailed analysis
Deliver preliminary sizing calculations, hand calculations, and simplified estimates to inform the design
Support ground and flight tests
Deliver detailed technical reports and presentations
Assist in the development of manufacturing, integration, and test processes and procedures
Support the definition and execution of the qualification and certification process.


Requirements



What you'll need

Bachelor's Degree and/or Master's Degree in Aerospace Engineering or a related discipline
5-10 years of experience as an aerospace stress engineer
Experience in Turbomachinery sector
FEM experience, from building models to analysis, postprocessing, and debugging
Experienced with stress-hand calculation/analytical methods
Experience with both metallic and composite lightweight structural design for aerospace
Experience with Matlab
Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Knowledge of the English language is required. Knowledge of Dutch, Spanish, French, or German language is an advantage
You are resilient, open to change, and manage stress positively


Who You Are

You're an engineer who thrives in high‑stakes, fast‑moving environments. You blend analytical rigor with engineering intuition, turning complex problems into clear solutions. You see every load case as a challenge to master and every analysis as a chance to push the limits of what's possible in flight.



Benefits



Why Join Us?

✨ The Thrill of the Future - Work on cutting-edge projects that redefine aerospace.
✨ Global Innovation Hub - Collaborate with top engineers from all over the world.
✨ Fast-Paced & High-Growth - Experience the rush of working in a rapidly expanding company.
✨ Real Impact - Your work won't be theoretical—it will shape the future of flight.

Destinus is an equal-opportunity employer. We value diversity in our companies and our teams and do not discriminate based on age, race, religion, color, country of origin, gender, sexual orientation, or disability status.

🚀 Destinus - Challenge the limits of time, space, and human potential.

Title: Junior Business Analyst
Description:
Are you analytical, curious and interested in the intersection of technology, legislation and digital innovation? Would you like to contribute to a safer digital society while working with the latest developments in eIDAS 2.0 and digital identity? Then we'd love to meet you.

As a Junior Business Analyst at Vidua, you'll help shape the future of digital identity by supporting innovative projects, ensuring compliance and helping customers implement secure, scalable digital solutions.

About Cleverbase And Vidua

At Cleverbase, we make online business secure, reliable and paperless.

As a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP), we comply with the highest standards established by the Dutch government and the European Union. Our mission is to eliminate paperwork and make digital transactions as trustworthy as possible.

Our innovative platform Vidua enables secure digital identity verification and electronic document signing. Our solutions are used across multiple sectors, including housing, financial services, healthcare, government and international trade.

Every day we issue more than 500 digital identity wallets through a highly secure onboarding process recognized by the European Union at the highest assurance level. These wallets allow users to securely log in, sign contracts electronically and verify their identity online.

With the introduction of the revised eIDAS Regulation, demand for trusted digital identity solutions is growing rapidly. That's why we're looking for talented new colleagues to help us build the future of digital trust.

Your role as a Junior Business Analyst

As part of our Compliance & Consultancy Team, you'll play an important role in both our customers' digital transformation and Cleverbase's compliance activities.

You'll help organizations and business ecosystems design secure, scalable and future-proof processes. You'll translate complex European legislation into practical business solutions while supporting the continued growth of our services.

Maintaining our status as a Qualified Trust Service Provider requires continuous compliance with international regulations and industry standards. As part of the Compliance & Consultancy Team, you'll help monitor, improve and safeguard Cleverbase's compliance framework.

What will you do?


Analyze customer requirements, business processes and value chains.
Translate European legislation into practical business solutions.
Support project managers during implementation and integration projects.
Collaborate with cryptographers, legal experts and solution architects on innovative digital identity and trust services.
Contribute to national and international research projects and pilots related to eIDAS 2.0.
Monitor and improve Cleverbase's compliance with international regulations and standards.
Identify legislative developments and assess their impact on our services.
Help optimize internal processes and support continuous improvement initiatives.


Who are you?

You're analytical, eager to learn and enjoy solving complex business challenges. You have an interest in technology, digital innovation and regulatory compliance, and you're motivated to make a real impact.

You also bring:


A completed (or nearly completed) Master's degree in, for example:Information Management Public Administration Engineering Management Law Economics Or a comparable academic discipline
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent communication skills.
A proactive and curious mindset.
An interest in innovation, compliance and digital transformation.


What do we offer?

Working at Vidua means helping build innovative solutions that make online interactions safer and more reliable.

We offer:


A competitive salary based on your knowledge and experience.
Plenty of freedom to shape your own career and professional development.
An exciting position within a fast-growing technology company.
Collaboration with experts in cryptography, digital law and IT architecture.
A dynamic working environment where initiative and entrepreneurship are valued.
A modern office in The Hague, easily accessible by public transport, bicycle and car.


Why join Vidua?

At Vidua, you'll work with talented, ambitious and supportive colleagues who are passionate about building the future of digital identity.

You'll contribute to innovative projects with real societal impact while working on some of Europe's most advanced digital trust solutions.

Every day brings new challenges, opportunities to learn and the chance to make a meaningful contribution to a safer digital world.

Diversity & Inclusion

We believe everyone should feel welcome and empowered to be themselves.

Our team includes people from a wide range of nationalities, cultures, backgrounds, ages and experiences. We believe diversity drives innovation and makes us stronger as a company.

Even if you don't meet every qualification listed, if this opportunity excites you, we'd love to hear from you.

Apply now

Ready to make an impact?

Send your CV and motivation letter to our Recruitment Team.

If you have any questions about this position, please contact Iris van der Wel.

We value potential as much as experience, so if you believe you can contribute to our mission, we encourage you to apply.

Screening

Because we work with sensitive personal information, a pre-employment screening is part of our recruitment process.

Successful candidates will be required to obtain a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG) before joining Cleverbase.

Keywords

Junior Business Analyst, Business Analyst, Digital Identity, Digital Identity Solutions, Identity Verification, eIDAS, eIDAS 2.0, Compliance, Compliance Analyst, Compliance Consultant, Trust Services, Qualified Trust Service Provider, QTSP, Business Consulting, Process Analysis, Business Process Improvement, Information Management, Public Administration, Law, Economics, Digital Transformation, FinTech, RegTech, Identity Management, Electronic Signatures, Digital Wallet, Technology Consulting, Graduate Jobs, Entry Level, Starter, The Hague, Innovation, Business Consultancy, Digital Trust.

Your role as a Junior Business Analyst

As part of our Compliance & Consultancy Team, you'll play an important role in both our customers' digital transformation and Cleverbase's compliance activities.

You'll help organizations and business ecosystems design secure, scalable and future-proof processes. You'll translate complex European legislation into practical business solutions while supporting the continued growth of our services.

Maintaining our status as a Qualified Trust Service Provider requires continuous compliance with international regulations and industry standards. As part of the Compliance & Consultancy Team, you'll help monitor, improve and safeguard Cleverbase's compliance framework.

What will you do?

  • Analyze customer requirements, business processes and value chains.
  • Translate European legislation into practical business solutions.
  • Support project managers during implementation and integration projects.
  • Collaborate with cryptographers, legal experts and solution architects on innovative digital identity and trust services.
  • Contribute to national and international research projects and pilots related to eIDAS 2.0.
  • Monitor and improve Cleverbase's compliance with international regulations and standards.
  • Identify legislative developments and assess their impact on our services.
  • Help optimize internal processes and support continuous improvement initiatives.

Who are you?

You're analytical, eager to learn and enjoy solving complex business challenges. You have an interest in technology, digital innovation and regulatory compliance, and you're motivated to make a real impact.

You also bring:

  • A completed (or nearly completed) Master's degree in, for example:Information Management Public Administration Engineering Management Law Economics Or a comparable academic discipline
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent communication skills.
  • A proactive and curious mindset.
  • An interest in innovation, compliance and digital transformation.

What do we offer?

Working at Vidua means helping build innovative solutions that make online interactions safer and more reliable.

We offer:

  • A competitive salary based on your knowledge and experience.
  • Plenty of freedom to shape your own career and professional development.
  • An exciting position within a fast-growing technology company.
  • Collaboration with experts in cryptography, digital law and IT architecture.
  • A dynamic working environment where initiative and entrepreneurship are valued.
  • A modern office in The Hague, easily accessible by public transport, bicycle and car.

Why join Vidua?

At Vidua, you'll work with talented, ambitious and supportive colleagues who are passionate about building the future of digital identity.

You'll contribute to innovative projects with real societal impact while working on some of Europe's most advanced digital trust solutions.

Every day brings new challenges, opportunities to learn and the chance to make a meaningful contribution to a safer digital world.

Diversity & Inclusion

We believe everyone should feel welcome and empowered to be themselves.

Our team includes people from a wide range of nationalities, cultures, backgrounds, ages and experiences. We believe diversity drives innovation and makes us stronger as a company.

Even if you don't meet every qualification listed, if this opportunity excites you, we'd love to hear from you.

Apply now

Ready to make an impact?

Send your CV and motivation letter to our Recruitment Team.

If you have any questions about this position, please contact Iris van der Wel.

We value potential as much as experience, so if you believe you can contribute to our mission, we encourage you to apply.

Screening

Because we work with sensitive personal information, a pre-employment screening is part of our recruitment process.

Successful candidates will be required to obtain a Certificate of Good Conduct (VOG) before joining Cleverbase.

Keywords

Junior Business Analyst, Business Analyst, Digital Identity, Digital Identity Solutions, Identity Verification, eIDAS, eIDAS 2.0, Compliance, Compliance Analyst, Compliance Consultant, Trust Services, Qualified Trust Service Provider, QTSP, Business Consulting, Process Analysis, Business Process Improvement, Information Management, Public Administration, Law, Economics, Digital Transformation, FinTech, RegTech, Identity Management, Electronic Signatures, Digital Wallet, Technology Consulting, Graduate Jobs, Entry Level, Starter, The Hague, Innovation, Business Consultancy, Digital Trust.

Title: Groenexpert gezocht!
Description:
Heb jij groene vingers én een vlotte babbel? Dan zijn wij op zoek naar jou! Wij zijn een jong en ambitieus tuincentrum met een ervaren en hecht team van collega’s. Ter versterking van onze buitengroen-afdeling zoeken we een enthousiaste verkoper die met kennis, plezier en klantgerichtheid aan de slag wil.

Wat ga je doen?


Klanten adviseren over bomen, struiken, vaste planten en seizoensgroen
Zorg dragen voor een nette en verzorgde afdeling
Planten onderhouden: water geven, bijhouden van de voorraad en aanvullen
Samenwerken met collega’s om de afdeling verder te laten groeien
Meedenken over de presentatie van het assortiment


Wat zoeken wij?


Je hebt kennis van en/of ervaring met buitengroen (planten, bomen, struiken)
Je bent klantvriendelijk en communicatief sterk
Je werkt graag buiten én met mensen
Je bent beschikbaar voor 4 of 5 dagen per week, inclusief minimaal één weekenddag
Je hebt oog voor detail en houdt van een opgeruimde werkomgeving


Wat bieden wij?


Een gezellig team waar je je snel thuis voelt
Een afwisselende baan in een groeiend tuincentrum
Veel ruimte voor eigen initiatief
Een marktconform salaris op basis van ervaring en inzet
Werken in een groene omgeving met veel frisse lucht 🌱


Ben jij de collega waar we naar op zoek zijn? Laat van je horen door te reageren via de link. We kijken ernaar uit je te ontmoeten!

Solliciteer direct! Of ga terug naar het vacatureoverzicht

Title: Sud-Aveyron. Un livre jeunesse pour semer des vocations
Description:
Marie-Pierre, au centre, entourée de son époux, leurs trois enfants et leur gendre. - © DR

Par Léa Pecqueux

Le 24 November 2025

En 2023, plusieurs femmes agricultrices se sont rassemblées pour collaborer avec l’association CoSE afin de donner vie à un projet ambitieux : la création d’un livre pour enfants dédié au métier d’agricultrice.

L’Association Aveyronnaise CoSE (Compréhension et Communication Société et Élevage), regroupant notamment des syndicats tels que le CAF (Conseil Agriculture Française) et les JA (Jeunes Agriculteurs), a lancé ce projet innovant en 2023. L’objectif est de dépasser la représentation traditionnelle et réductrice de la femme en milieu agricole — souvent perçue comme la « fermière donnant à manger aux poules, accompagnée de ses enfants » — pour mettre en lumière ces femmes cheffes d’entreprise dans toute leur complexité professionnelle. Title: COME JOIN OUR TEAM
Description:
Het gaat om een functie voor 32 uur per week. Je werkdagen en -tijden zijn in overleg.

Je werkt in een sportieve en energieke omgeving waar mensen komen om zich goed te voelen. De sfeer is actief, sociaal en positief. Samen met je collega’s zorg je ervoor dat leden zich welkom en op hun gemak voelen.

Werk je dienst en pak daarna nog een workout mee. Of juist even sporten vóór je begint. Bij ons heb je de vrijheid om werk en sport slim te combineren.

Wat ga je doen?


Je gaat voor 32 uur per week aan de slag bij onze club in Amersfoort.
Je maakt actief contact met de leden, herkent vaste gezichten en zorgt ervoor dat nieuwe leden zich direct thuisvoelen.
Je hebt een scherp oog voor detail. Ligt de handdoek recht? Is de koffiecorner netjes? Werkt alles naar behoren? Jij ziet het voordat een lid het merkt.
Je coördineert de sfeer in de horeca en zorgt voor een naadloze overgang tussen inspanning en ontspanning.
Je houdt de sfeer goed én relaxed door te zorgen dat iedereen de huisregels respecteert, van handdoekgebruik tot hygiëne. Zie je iets dat beter kan? Dan pak je dat moeiteloos op, met een positieve, coachende toon.
Je schakelt moeiteloos met alle afdelingen. Zie je dat de ledenervaring ergens onder druk staat? Dan grijp je direct in en stuur je bij, zodat alles weer soepel loopt en de beleving top blijft.


Wat krijg je van ons?


Je gaat voor 32 uur aan de slag in een bruisende, sportieve omgeving.
Voor of na je werk nog even sporten of de wellness induiken.
Een gezellig team van collega’s.


Wat is belangrijk?


Je hebt een achtergrond in de hospitality (bijv. hotel, high-end horeca of leisure) en beschikt over leidinggevende ervaring.
Je bent graag onder de mensen en stapt gemakkelijk op iemand af voor een praatje. Je bent extravert en bruist van de energie. Met een duidelijke passie voor een gezonde, actieve lifestyle die je moeiteloos overbrengt op anderen.
Je hebt oog voor detail en slordigheden zijn simpelweg geen optie. Jij gaat altijd voor die 9+ ervaring en legt de lat net even hoger, elke dag weer.
Club Pellikaan bruist juist wanneer anderen vrij zijn. Avonden en weekenden? Voor jou geen obstakel, maar hét moment om er te zijn, daar waar je de meeste leden ontmoet en het verschil maakt.
Je woont in omgeving Amersfoort.


Is dit jouw baan?

Dan maken we graag kennis met je! Stuur je motivatie, cv foto naar Dennis Vos via: dvos@clubpellikaan.nl.

Club Pellikaan is een familiebedrijf met zeven sportclubs. We kiezen duidelijk voor een andere positionering dan een gewone sportschool. Wij geloven dat alles gaat om balans. Title: Mechanical Engineer (Hydraulic)
Description:
Hydraulic Engineer

Werk jij graag aan de nieuwste generatie voertuigen en weet jij alles van hydraulische systemen? Als Hydraulic Engineer krijg je de kans om een sleutelrol te spelen in de ontwikkeling van innovatieve automotive oplossingen bij een toonaangevende fabrikant.




Wat ga je doen?

Je ontwerpt, ontwikkelt en test hydraulische systemen voor voertuigen van stuurinrichtingen tot remsystemen en aandrijflijnen. Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s uit verschillende disciplines zoals mechanica, elektronica en software om tot een optimaal geïntegreerd systeem te komen.

Je houdt je onder andere bezig met:

Ontwerpen en modelleren van hydraulische circuits en componenten
Selecteren van componenten op basis van technische specificaties en kostenefficiëntie
Analyseren van systeemprestaties en uitvoeren van FMEA’s
Begeleiden van de bouw van prototypes en het uitvoeren van tests
Afstemmen met leveranciers en klanten over technische eisen en interfaces




Jouw profiel

Je hebt een hbo- of wo-opleiding in werktuigbouwkunde, automotive engineering of vergelijkbaar
Je hebt ervaring met hydraulische systemen in een voertuigtechnische context
Je bent bekend met hydraulische ontwerppakketten
Je werkt gestructureerd, denkt oplossingsgericht en houdt van samenwerken binnen multidisciplinaire teams




Interesse?

Solliciteer dan direct!

Kijk voor meer vacatures op www.uptec.nl

HTML:
Hydraulic Engineer

Werk jij graag aan de nieuwste generatie voertuigen en weet jij alles van hydraulische systemen? Als Hydraulic Engineer krijg je de kans om een sleutelrol te spelen in de ontwikkeling van innovatieve automotive oplossingen bij een toonaangevende fabrikant.


Wat ga je doen?

Je ontwerpt, ontwikkelt en test hydraulische systemen voor voertuigen van stuurinrichtingen tot remsystemen en aandrijflijnen. Je werkt nauw samen met collega’s uit verschillende disciplines zoals mechanica, elektronica en software om tot een optimaal geïntegreerd systeem te komen.

Je houdt je onder andere bezig met:

  • Ontwerpen en modelleren van hydraulische circuits en componenten
  • Selecteren van componenten op basis van technische specificaties en kostenefficiëntie
  • Analyseren van systeemprestaties en uitvoeren van FMEA’s
  • Begeleiden van de bouw van prototypes en het uitvoeren van tests
  • Afstemmen met leveranciers en klanten over technische eisen en interfaces


Jouw profiel

  • Je hebt een hbo- of wo-opleiding in werktuigbouwkunde, automotive engineering of vergelijkbaar
  • Je hebt ervaring met hydraulische systemen in een voertuigtechnische context
  • Je bent bekend met hydraulische ontwerppakketten
  • Je werkt gestructureerd, denkt oplossingsgericht en houdt van samenwerken binnen multidisciplinaire teams


Interesse?

Solliciteer dan direct!

Kijk voor meer vacatures op www.uptec.nl

Title: Sportprofessional Monkey Moves BSO (& Club)
Description:
Omschrijving organisatie

Monkey Moves staat voor de kracht van een beweegrijke start. We zijn het fundament voor groei door beweging.

Wij geloven dat kinderen kunnen bloeien en groeien, door op hun eigen tempo bewegend de wereld te ontdekken en nieuwsgierigheid te prikkelen en dat de beste begeleiding in de juiste omgeving daar de perfecte voedingsbodem voor biedt.

Door slim en schaalbaar samen te werken maken we impact op een groot maatschappelijk probleem, namelijk een toename aan zorgkosten en economische schade door de gevolgen van inactiviteit en overgewicht.

Wij als Monkey Move’ers geven zelf het goede voorbeeld. We bewegen veel en veelzijdig, eten gezond en zien tegenslagen als uitdagingen die we samen oplossen.

Functieomschrijving

Wij nodigen u alleen uit te solliciteren als u voldoet aan het gevraagde functieprofiel. Andere sollicitaties zullen niet in behandeling worden genomen.

Ben jij de sportheld die wij zoeken?

Maak impact

Met jouw werk draag je bij aan de ontwikkeling van heel veel kinderen!

Heb plezier in je werk

Over 30 jaar gaan kinderen jouw aandacht en enthousiasme zich nog herinneren.

Leren en groeien

Met de stap voor stap Monkey Moves opleiding ontwikkel jij jezelf op vele vlakken!

Jouw rol als ' Sportprofessional Monkey Moves BSO (& Club)


binnen Monkey MovesUtrecht


Jouw rol als sportprofessional bij Monkey Moves BSO (& Club)

Jij bent coach, begeleider en rolmodel en je geeft kinderen het begin van een leven lang actief bewegen mee.

Bij Monkey Moves gebruik je een avontuurlijke multisport aanpak om kinderen te laten groeien: motorisch, sociaal én mentaal.

Je werkt praktisch, energiek en met veel vrijheid in de uitvoering zonder vergadercultuur of zware administratie. Kinderen zitten steeds meer stil. Breng jij ze met ons in beweging?

Monkey Moves is koploper op het gebied van breed motorische ontwikkeling van kinderen.

Bij Monkey Moves draait het om spelenderwijs ontdekken, avontuur en plezier maken. Jij laat kinderen ervaren hoe leuk bewegen kan zijn, zonder prestatiedruk, mét impact. Overigens ook zonder administratie. Jij staat op het veld; daar gebeurt het.

Fulltime of parttime aan de slag! Parttime: vaste middagen op de BSO (24–28 uur). Deze optie is perfect als je overdag vrij wilt zijn en in de middag met kinderen wilt sporten en ravotten in buitenlucht. Je werkt op vaste dagen en op één of twee vaste locaties.

Fulltime: afwisselende combirol met middagen op BSO en flexibele uren inzet bij Club (28–36 uur). Voor wie een fulltime baan zoekt, bieden we ook de mogelijkheid om, naast de uren op de BSO, aan de slag te gaan bij Monkey Moves Club. Bij Monkey Moves Club geef je - in de ochtenden en/of op weekenddagen - multisportlessen in de gymzaal aan kinderen in de leeftijd 1.5-6 jaar. Meer uren, meer afwisseling, meer impact.

Wie ben jij?

Je hebt een sportachtergrond zoals CIOS, MBO Sport & Bewegen (niveau 3/4), ALO / LO Ervaring als jeugdtrainer, sportcoach, buurtsportcoach of in sportkampen (freelance of vast) is een pré. Jij krijgt energie van: doen, bewegen, buiten zijn, kinderen zien groeien

Je houdt van duidelijkheid: vaste uren/dagen, heldere afspraken, korte lijnen

Je communiceert prettig met kinderen, collega’s en ouders (zonder “zorgtaal”) Heb je wél een sportdiploma, maar géén pedagogisch diploma? Dat kan alsnog passen.

Voor werken op de BSO is een sportdiploma in veel gevallen voldoende (afhankelijk van je opleiding). Je kunt dit checken via Diplomacheck Kinderopvang. Pedagogisch sterker worden? Dat regelen we samen: buddy, routines, coaching en feedback zonder betutteling.

Zo ziet jouw werkdag er bijvoorbeeld uit

Klaarmaken van de locatie en de verrassende (multisport) activiteiten voorbereiden

Kinderen van school ophalen in de bakfiets en zorgen voor een moment van rust met een gezonde snack

Beweegavonturen begeleiden en afsluiten met een kort ouder gesprek

We Bieden Je Het Volgende


1 . Coaching on the job en interne opleidingen om jezelf verder te ontwikkelen
2 . Werken in een apeleuk team met regelmatig toffe activiteiten
3 . Werken in een sociale organisatie waarin het maken van impact centraal staat
4 . Vrijheid om mee te denken en je eigen ideeen te ontplooien
5 . Vele doorgroeimogelijkheden binnen BSO, Club en misschien wel een eigen aperots?!
6 . Lekker bewegen en buiten zijn!

Title: Customer Success Specialist - Food Science
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Customer Success Specialist - Food Science based in Netherlands.

This remote opportunity is ideal for a customer-focused professional who enjoys building lasting client relationships while supporting businesses in regulated industries. In this role, you will serve as the primary point of contact throughout the customer journey, providing consultative guidance, coordinating projects, and ensuring an outstanding client experience from inquiry to completion. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver laboratory testing and labeling solutions while helping customers understand technical information in a clear and practical way. The position combines customer success, inside sales, and project coordination in a dynamic remote environment where organization, responsiveness, and communication are essential. This is an excellent opportunity to make a meaningful impact by helping customers achieve compliance and successfully bring products to market.

Accountabilities

As a Customer Success Specialist, you will own the customer relationship from the initial inquiry through project completion, ensuring a seamless and high-quality experience. Your responsibilities will include:


Responding promptly to inbound web and phone inquiries while serving as the primary point of contact for customers.
Conducting consultative conversations to understand customer objectives and recommend appropriate laboratory testing, labeling, and related services.
Preparing, presenting, and following up on proposals while guiding qualified opportunities through the sales process.
Managing customer relationships after project initiation by coordinating onboarding, project timelines, status updates, report delivery, and follow-up activities.
Collaborating with internal teams to ensure laboratory testing, labeling projects, and customer commitments remain aligned.
Monitoring project progress, addressing customer questions, resolving routine billing inquiries, and maintaining accurate documentation within CRM and project management systems.
Identifying opportunities for additional services while maintaining a trusted advisor relationship with customers.
Contributing customer feedback and process improvement ideas to enhance service quality and the overall customer experience.


Requirements

The ideal candidate combines customer relationship management expertise with strong organizational skills and the ability to communicate technical information effectively. Candidates should possess:


At least 5 years of experience in customer success, account management, consultative inside sales, business development, or another customer-facing role.
Proven experience managing multiple customer accounts, sales opportunities, and concurrent projects with exceptional attention to detail.
Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with a professional and customer-focused approach.
Ability to understand technical services and translate complex concepts into practical, easy-to-understand guidance.
Experience using CRM platforms such as HubSpot, along with invoicing tools like QuickBooks or equivalent software.
Strong proficiency with Microsoft Outlook, Excel, Word, Teams, and project management platforms.
Ability to work independently within a collaborative remote environment while maintaining a strong sense of urgency and accountability.
Availability to work full-time during Mountain Standard Time (MST) or Pacific Standard Time (PST) business hours.
Experience in food science, laboratory testing, food manufacturing, dietary supplements, pet food, or another regulated industry is preferred.
Knowledge of food labeling regulations, nutrition facts panels, FDA, USDA, or AAFCO requirements is considered an advantage.


Benefits


Full-time remote position with the flexibility to work from anywhere.
Opportunity to manage customer relationships in a consultative, non-cold-calling environment.
Exposure to laboratory testing, food science, regulatory compliance, and product labeling projects.
Collaborative team culture with close interaction across customer success, operations, and technical teams.
Modern technology stack including HubSpot, Monday.com, QuickBooks, Microsoft Office, and Microsoft Teams.
Opportunity to develop expertise within the food science and regulatory compliance sector.
Competitive compensation package based on qualifications and experience.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: TikTok - Acquisition Manager
Description:
Responsibilities
Roles & Responsibilities
- Develop acquisition and growth strategies, aligning with business objectives. Define clear goals and priorities, and pinpoint high-potential opportunities and scalable approaches.
- Drive merchant sourcing and onboarding by identifying and securing high-quality merchants that fit TikTok commerce’s positioning. Design and implement partnership frameworks with diverse third parties, including commerce platforms, industry associations, and marketing solution providers to accelerate growth and market penetration.
- Collaborate cross-functionally to streamline new merchants' launch processes, remove operational barriers, and build early-stage success stories that establish market credibility.
- Continuously monitor and analyze merchant and merchandise acquisition performance, optimizing strategies to maximize efficiency and drive sustainable growth.

Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications:
- Experience in e-commerce operations or related fields,
- Experience of successfully driving initiatives independently while effectively working with diverse cross-functional teams.
- Data-driven and structured thinker, combining analytical rigor with a strong focus on achieving measurable goals.

Preferred Qualifications:
- A deep understanding of the EU e-commerce landscape is highly desirable.
- Fast learner, proactive, and resilient, able to perform under pressure and excel in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.

About TikTok
TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​


Why Join Us
Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​
We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​
​
Diversity & Inclusion​
TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Title: Production Engineer (Entry Level)
Description:
Functieomschrijving

Wil jij een belangrijke rol spelen in het optimaliseren van productieprocessen binnen een hightech machinebouwer in Eindhoven? Als Production Engineer zorg je ervoor dat productieprocessen efficiënt, maakbaar en betrouwbaar zijn. Je combineert werkzaamheden op het gebied van werkvoorbereiding met procesoptimalisatie en bent continu bezig om de productie naar een hoger niveau te tillen.

Je werkt nauw samen met engineering, productie, supply chain en kwaliteit en bent betrokken bij zowel dagelijkse operationele uitdagingen als structurele verbeterprojecten. Hierdoor heb je direct invloed op de prestaties van de productieorganisatie.




Wat ga je doen?

Je vertaalt engineeringdata, stuklijsten en tekeningen naar een efficiënte productievoorbereiding
Je stelt productieprocessen, werkinstructies en routings op en houdt deze actueel
Je ondersteunt productie bij technische vraagstukken en lost knelpunten in het proces op
Je analyseert productieprestaties en identificeert verbeterkansen op het gebied van kwaliteit, doorlooptijd en efficiëntie
Je initieert en begeleidt procesverbeteringen binnen assemblage- en productieprocessen
Je werkt samen met engineering om de maakbaarheid van producten verder te verbeteren
Je ondersteunt bij introducties van nieuwe producten en wijzigingen binnen bestaande producten
Je bent betrokken bij Lean- en Continuous Improvement-projecten
Je zorgt voor een goede borging van processen, documentatie en werkwijzen binnen de organisatie




Jouw profiel

Je hebt een technische afgeronde bachelor- of masteropleiding in Werktuigbouwkunde, Mechatronica, Automotive of vergelijkbaar
Je bent analytisch sterk
Je werkt gestructureerd en hebt oog voor detail
Je communiceert gemakkelijk met verschillende afdelingen en stakeholders
Je bent proactief, resultaatgericht en neemt eigenaarschap over verbeteringen




Interesse?

Solliciteer dan direct!

Kijk voor meer vacatures op www.uptec.nl

Title: Innovation Consultant
HTML:
So, you want to become an Innovation Consultant? Great. But you're probably not looking to spend your days making PowerPoint decks. You want to solve real business challenges, work alongside leading organisations, and help redesign the way they work. That's exactly what you'll do at The Talent Institute!


At The Talent Institute, we don’t just offer you a job. We invest in your growth. Our mission is to empower the next generation of professionals to create impact. This isn’t just another job: it’s a career experience where you’ll gain hands-on experience, follow a full development program, and become part of a great culture that matches your ambitions (with plenty of fun along the way!).


At The Talent Institute, we offer you the opportunity to stay and grow with us for the long term. As your experience deepens, so do your opportunities, whether in project scope, role complexity, or personal development.


1️⃣ What you’ll do

You’ll work on projects at leading organizations like Philips, Versuni, Nationale Nederlanden, or ABN, helping them solve complex challenges and implement change. Your role will focus on driving transformation, executing strategies, and optimizing business processes.


One thing is always the same: you'll continuously explore how technologies like AI can create more value. Sometimes that means validating an AI concept, sometimes improving an existing workflow with automation, and sometimes building a prototype that demonstrates what's possible.


Example projects our talents have worked on:

  • Innovating new product propositions. Research customer needs, develop concepts, build prototypes, validate ideas through rapid experimentation, and explore how AI can strengthen the customer experience.
  • Implementing a company-wide transformation program by executing strategic initiatives and identifying where AI and digital tools can improve everyday work.
  • Optimizing digital customer journeys by analyzing user behavior, identifying pain points, and improving key interactions to increase engagement and conversion.


2️⃣ Learning experience - Grow as a digital professional

Alongside your work at leading companies, you’ll follow an intensive development program at The Talent Institute, where you will:

  • Personal coaching to sharpen your skills and position yourself as a strong, confident professional.
  • GROW Days: four immersive two-day experiences per year with deep-dive workshops, interactive challenges, and structured goal-setting.
  • GenAI development: strengthen your digital skills with collaborative GenAI experimentation sessions.
  • Continuous learning & peer support: apply new skills through on-the-job learning, intervision sessions, and a personal study budget to tailor your growth.


3️⃣ The TTI experience – More than work and learning

At The Talent Institute, you’re not just developing skills. You’re becoming part of a community of over 800 digital professionals.

Here’s what that looks like:

  • Winter and summer trips, team events, and social gatherings with a supportive group of like-minded professionals.
  • A dynamic environment where you’re encouraged to grow and supported in taking on new challenges.
  • The chance to work within a Certified B Corp organization that values impact and innovation in everything we do.


The perks:

What’s in it for you

  • Starting salary between €2700 to €3000, depending on experience and skills;
  • Annual salary increases of up to 15%;
  • Uncapped bonus scheme;
  • Permanent contract with exciting career progression opportunities;
  • Pension plan.


Personal development

  • Monthly one-on-one coaching with professional coaches;
  • €1000 personal study budget per year;
  • Unique development experiences such as silent retreats and ice-bath challenges.


Work-Life balance

  • 25 vacation days to recharge;
  • One-month paid sabbatical after three years;
  • Flexibility to work remotely for four weeks annually;
  • Vibrant office at the Kauwgomballenfabriek with padel courts nearby;
  • Fresh fruit and snacks in the office to keep you energized.


Community & culture

  • Fun and engaging team activities, including VrijMiBo's, summer and ski trips, and quarterly team culture days;
  • Office days on Wednesdays and Fridays to connect with colleagues, with the flexibility to work from home or your favorite spot the rest of the week.


Our ideal candidate:

  • Is a go-getter who knows how to make things happen;
  • Loves understanding how things work, and how they could work better.
  • 1 - 3 years of relevant experience and has an exceptional drive;
  • Speaks fluent Dutch and English;
  • Holds a Bachelor's or Master's degree;
  • Lives in the Randstad area;
  • Embraces the "I don't know, but I know how to find out" mentality;
  • Is excited about innovation, digital transformation and emerging technologies like AI.;
  • Believes learning never stops.


About TTI

At TTI, we don’t resist change, we embrace it. That’s crucial for innovation to happen. We are entrepreneurial solution finders, instead of corporate soldiers.


We are committed to creating a workplace that celebrates diversity and ensures equal opportunities for all team members.


Please note that we are unable to provide visa sponsorship. We encourage applications from individuals who already have the right to work in The Netherlands.

Title: Senior AI & MLOps Engineer
HTML:
Join Data & Analytics as Senior AI & MLOps Engineer and help build the next generation of data and AI-driven solutions.


Job Description:


What will you do?

This role sits at the intersection of business, data engineering, and AI innovation, where you will translate business problems into scalable data and AI use cases.


You will play a key role in designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining statistical (credit risk) models and AI solutions, with a strong focus on Databricks and modern cloud platforms (Azure).


Beyond traditional data science, you will actively contribute to AI solution design, leveraging tools such as Azure AI Foundry, LangChain, and LangGraph, enabling the business to unlock value through cutting-edge AI capabilities.


Responsibilities

1. Data Science & Modelling

  • Develop, deploy, and maintain statistical and machine learning models;
  • Ensure models are production-ready, explainable, and compliant;
  • Apply best practices in experimentation, validation, and testing;
  • Build and maintain solutions on Databricks, including pipelines and model deployment workflows;
  • Implement MLOps best practices to ensure scalability, reliability, and monitoring;
  • Collaborate with engineers to integrate models into the enterprise data platform.


2. AI & Advanced Analytics

  • Design and develop AI solutions using frameworks such as LangChain and LangGraph;
  • Work with Azure AI Foundry to build and operationalize AI use cases;
  • Translate business problems into technical AI solutions (know where to use AI and where not to);
  • Enable business teams with intelligent, scalable, and practical AI implementations.


3. Quality & Engineering Excellence

  • Treat testing as an integral part of development, including unit, integration, and data validation tests;
  • Ensure high-quality, production-grade code and solutions;
  • Maintain robust documentation for models, pipelines, and processes.


4. Collaboration & Architecture

  • Work closely with business stakeholders, data engineers, and architects;
  • Support architecture discussions by contributing best practices and technical insights;
  • Ensure solutions align with enterprise architecture and governance standards.


Your Team

You will be part of the Advanced Analytics team, a multidisciplinary team within the Data & Analytics department. The team’s mission is to enable the organization to deliver high-quality, scalable AI & data products using a modern cloud & data platform.

We work closely with domain teams across risk, retail, corporate banking, and finance to drive data-driven decision making and AI adoption at scale.


NIBC as an IT employer

NIBC IT consists out of several domains and together NIBC IT aims to be one of the driving forces behind the digital transformation of our bank, an ongoing process that will profoundly change the relationship with our clients and the way we do business. We are closely connected and have short lines of communication. If you have a good idea today, you may be elaborating it tomorrow. IT is forever changing and so is NIBC and in order for us to be able to keep on changing, we need sophisticated individuals to help us lead the bank into the future.


NIBC as organization

Founded in 1945 to finance the visionary entrepreneurs who helped rebuilding the Netherlands after the second World War, NIBC was closely collaborating while professionally supporting companies and individuals in realizing their dreams and goals with a sustainable future in mind. As a multicultural midsize bank with a working environment that is best described as dynamic and ambitious, we share a forward-thinking, can-do attitude with our employees and clients which we call our THINK YES mentality. Our corporate values are Professional, Adaptive, Collaborative and Entrepreneurial. You will have a direct and meaningful impact on both the bank and its clients. By building our company on optimism and mutual trust, and with our THINK YES mentality, NIBC is an enterprising bank that enables ambitions.


What’s in it for you?

NIBC is an ambitious environment where together we strive to create a fantastic workplace where you feel safe and challenged to be the best version of yourself. This is in line Professional, Adaptive, Collaborative and Entrepreneurial, since you are in the lead of setting the PACE of your career at NIBC. In addition, you receive a competitive salary, plus:

  • Several ways to support your development personally and professionally, a.o.: personal development budget to spend at your own discretion, professional budget provided by your manager to develop yourself in your work, In-house learning offering;
  • NIBC embraces the Hybrid way of Working. This means that we support working from home as well as encourage our colleagues to come to the office. NIBC's guideline is to spend at least half of the working time at the office;
  • Travel expenses or NS Business Card 1st class ;
  • 32 holidays (which do not have to be registered);
  • Excellent pension scheme (26% NIBC contribution);
  • A voucher to improve your home office;
  • The opportunity to take ownership and show initiative in your role. We are always open to new ideas, and encourage to use your voice;
  • The nature of our Grow to Make a Difference program enables you to be in charge of your own development;
  • Two staff associations: YoungNIBC and MyLeisure;
  • Vitality program, annual company-wide sports & leisure days;
  • Monthly internet allowance;
  • Laptop and a company phone;
  • Excellent facilities at the office (Coffeecorner, Restaurant, Exchange bar);
  • Last but not least, a fun workplace in which diversity and inclusion is valued (click here).


What do you bring?

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, or a related field;
  • 5+ years of experience in Data Science, AI, or MLOps roles;
  • Proven experience in developing, deploying, and maintaining statistical and machine learning models;
  • Strong proficiency in Python, with experience writing production-grade code;
  • Experience with Spark is a pre;
  • Hands-on experience with Databricks, including model development, jobs, pipeline orchestration, and deployment workflows;
  • Experience working with cloud platforms (preferably Azure) and modern data architecture.


We are looking for someone who:

  • Has a “can-do” mentality and focuses on solutions rather than problems;
  • Takes ownership of quality and does not compromise on deliverables;
  • Treat testing and validation as core responsibilities;
  • Is a strong team player, collaborating effectively across teams;
  • Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders;
  • Thinks proactively about innovation and continuous improvement;
  • Embraces AI and continuously finds ways to enhance personal and team productivity.


Still intrigued?

Click the apply button now! To upload multiple documents, click the upload button again after uploading a document. An assessment may be part of the application procedure. For more information about the recruitment procedure or NIBC as employer you may contact our HR Servicedesk via AskHR@nibc.com


Applications via email will not be taken into consideration.

Title: AI Lead Healthcare
Description:
What are you going to do?

AI is the path to a smarter, kinder and more resilient healthcare future. We are looking for a strategic and empowering AI Lead to shape and translate the Nedap Healthcare AI vision into reality and an integral part of the Ons Suite & MediKIT. The position requires leadership of multidisciplinary teams, fostering a collaborative and innovative mindset, and a focus on compliance. The goal? To create seamless, user-friendly AI innovations that transform what it means to work as a Healthcare professional. Initially, the focus of the group will be on delivering the first AI applications for the Ons Suite & MediKIT. In the long run, the group will scale this approach and act as an expert enabler for teams that build and adopt AI in Nedap Healthcare solutions.




Your responsibilities




Vision And Roadmap

You translate Nedap Healthcare's strategic objectives into a vision for the AI Group and, with its teams, refine this into a clear, actionable roadmap. You embedd the AI roadmap into the strategic planning processes in Nedap Healthcare and make sure that the group is properly represented;




People And Collaboration

Within the group, it is your responsibility to foster a culture of ambition, trust and ownership. You encourage and identify cooperation between teams whenever useful and ensure timely delivery of customer value. Teams are self-directed in their work to ensure progress and you play an empowering and supportive role. You promote and support cross-team collaboration to ensure a unified and coherent Ons Suite & MediKIT experience. You rather tackle issues up front than deal with them during escalations;




Innovation And Architecture

You inspire colleagues, simplify complexity and tackle software architecture bottlenecks in order to make AI a natural part of product development and product design within Nedap Healthcare. You stay up to date with the evolution of AI and identify new opportunities.




Ecosystem And Partnerships

You are the primary spokesperson for our AI strategy and vision, both internally and externally. In this capacity. You engage with customers, business partners, universities, research organisations and national healthcare bodies to shape the future of AI within Healthcare.




Legal And Compliance

As a group we are at the starting point to qualify for the MDR. The AI Group by essence is the frontrunner to embed a compliant way of working. You own he collaboration with Security and Compliance from our Dataprotection Team to achieve this qualification.




Your team

As an AI Lead you will lead the AI group, which houses diverse disciplines, like developers, frontend engineers, UX specialists, data scientists, machine learning & NLP experts, data engineers and data analysts. It has the following subteams that you will be responsible for:

The AI Platform team provides an evolving catalog of generic AI services that makes the development of AI applications faster, more robust, and easier to govern.
The Data Products team improves the Ons Suite UX in collaboration with other teams by leveraging usage and user data (eg, via Natural Language Processing, Information Retrieval, Process mining and Machine Learning).
The Virtual Assistant team builds a workflow-based AI platform and products for the Ons Suite and beyond. Their mission is to automate any business workflow, including ones that involve human communication.

In addition, there are other AI and Data Science oriented teams. While functional decisions and prioritisation remain within those teams, you will collaborate closely with them, bringing in the expertise and way of working from the AI group. You are responsible for the technical quality that results from the collaboration. These teams are:

Lumos, which supports Ons Suite users in finding the right information at the right time through AI, using their context (role, time, workflow). Their vision is to transform from conversational AI to Generative UI, where traditional interfaces become dynamic and context-driven rather than static.
MediKIT Intelligence, which applies AI in our information system for general practitioners.

You will mentor your team members, while you yourself will report to the Head of Product Development, and become part of our tribe leads team (which includes, among others, the Dossier, the Integrations, and the Mobile tribe lead). In order to do this properly, we expect you to work on site at our Groenlo campus for at least two days a week.




What's in it for you?

As an AI Lead at Nedap, you make a valuable contribution to our goal: making people happier and more successful in their professional lives. The salary range for this role is between € 5.000 and € 8.000 gross per month based on full-time employment (38 hours) and depends on relevant knowledge and experience. In addition to your salary, you are entitled to a thirteenth month, a good pension scheme, and profit sharing with the opportunity to become a shareholder of Nedap. Everything we do revolves around trust and autonomy. That’s why, along with your colleagues, you decide on your own working hours and vacation days to maintain a healthy work-life balance. We also place great value on personal and professional growth. You will receive a comprehensive introduction, and we encourage you to continually develop yourself.




Required skills

As an AI Lead you have a deep expertise in applied AI concepts, like auto-regressive generative deep learning architectures, machine learning evaluation metrics like precision, recall, harmonised mean, and natural language processing. You understand the limitations and that AI brings along and anticipate long-term trends. You do not get dragged along with the hype. You bring along working knowledge of legal and regulatory aspects in healthcare and/or enterprise domains.




You recognise yourself in the following:

Experience: You are experienced in leading complex software products and AI solutions;
Alignment: You are able to align strategically and to combine long-term vision with mid- and short-term delivery goals within the AI group and the organisation as a whole;
Empowering: You can empower multi-disciplinary teams and and people;
Communication: You posess excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. As you will visit customers to present your AI strategy, you are fluent in Dutch.
Management: You are goal oriented, pragmatic and creative when it comes to overcoming obstacles. Risks are managed, not avoided.

Good to know: You are available for 32–38 hours per week. You work in a hybrid setup, with regular presence in Groenlo in alignment with your team.




Get in touch!

Interested in the vacancy AI Lead Healthcare or curious about what it’s like to work at Nedap? Feel free to contact Nicole Mons via nicole.mons@nedap.com. We’re happy to help!




About Nedap

Nedap is a global leader in Digital Twin Technology, bridging the physical and digital worlds in Retail, Healthcare, Livestock, and Security. Guided by our Technology for Life philosophy, we create smart, sustainable solutions that help people and organizations thrive in a rapidly changing world. With over 1,000 colleagues, we shape the future with meaningful innovations.

Title: Junior DevOps Engineer
Description:
The opportunity:

As a Junior DevOps Engineer at O|P, you'll play a crucial role in supporting and enhancing our infrastructure and deployment processes. You'll work closely with our development and operations teams to ensure smooth, efficient, and secure delivery of our cutting-edge marketing analytics platform.




About Objective Platform:

Objective Platform is Europe’s leading MMM SaaS platform, enabling companies to track and optimize their omnichannel media investments. By harnessing the full potential of available data sources, our marketing measurement models offer a holistic view across digital and traditional media without sacrificing granular information. As a result, advertisers gain strategic and tactical insights to support budget allocation across time periods, campaigns, and channels, leading to sales uplifts of up to 20%. Objective Platform also helps advertisers build resilience against data restrictions attributable to cookie and privacy regulations. With Objective Platform, customers like Deutsche Telekom Group, Vattenfall, and PostNL take full control of their media investments.




Our culture and values:

Our culture can be described as a social start-up, with the financial benefits of a scale-up. Open and transparent, we are a developing team and organization who are open for feedback and are true team players. With EQ & IQ in balance, we put our egos aside, work hard and proactively help each other out. We’re passionate about working together to reach our set targets & KPIs, and we’re proud of the fact that we house more than 15 nationalities.

Our company values, which can be seen as our behavioral compass, support us in our daily interaction and decision making with our peers and customers. We are: #Innovative #Data Driven #Transparent #Ambitious #Collaborative




The role in a nutshell:

Responsibilities:

As a key member of our DevOps team, you will:

Manage Cloud Infrastructure: Assist in configuring, maintaining, and improving our cloud environments, primarily focusing on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Build & Maintain CI/CD Pipelines: Support the implementation and ongoing maintenance of continuous integration and continuous deployment pipelines to ensure smooth software delivery.
Drive Automation: Help automate manual deployment processes and infrastructure management to increase team efficiency.
Collaborate for Scalability: Work side-by-side with development teams to optimize the application performance, reliability, and scalability of our marketing analytics platform.
Ensure System Reliability: Actively participate in monitoring overall system health, analyzing metrics, and responding to incidents to minimize downtime.
Enforce Security Standards: Contribute to the integration and enforcement of security best practices across our deployment processes and cloud infrastructure.
Continuously Learn: Actively study and apply modern DevOps principles, tools, and methodologies in a fast-paced, real-world setting.




Requirements:

0-2 years of experience in a DevOps or similar technical role
Basic understanding of cloud platforms (GCP preferred)
Familiarity with containerization technologies (e.g., Docker)
Knowledge of scripting languages (e.g., Python, Bash)
Basic understanding of version control systems (Git)
Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Excellent communication skills in English

Preferred:

Experience with Kubernetes or other container orchestration platforms
Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools
Basic understanding of networking concepts
Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code tools (e.g., Terraform)




Why us?

We are a young Amsterdam-based tech company with smart, educated people who have a passion for their field of expertise.
We are output-driven, which creates freedom and responsibility.
An opportunity to implement our cutting-edge solution used by industry-leading clients to optimise large marketing investments.
A place within a team of young experts that learn from each other.
The chance to work at a fast-growing company with a unique mix of local and international clients.




What we offer (Objective Perks):

A competitive salary based on your experience.
25 holiday days per year (based on a full-time contract) as well as a day of Celebration Leave, which can be used to celebrate events not covered by the Dutch public holidays.
A great pension plan with NN.
A generous annual personal development budget and a training budget.
A mobility allowance (if you live more than 10km away from the office).
A health and wellness benefit in the form of company discounted subscriptions to ClassPass.
A positive, encouraging work environment with an open/flat culture.
A team of smart, young, motivated and ambitious colleagues to work alongside you.
An international environment, diverse with 15+ nationalities.
A daily healthy lunch at the office for a small monthly contribution.
A flexible approach to working facilitated through hybrid working.
Regular social activities and an annual weekend trip (in the past we have gone skiing, sailing and surfing).




Ready to shape the future of data-driven marketing? Apply now and be part of our journey to bring objectivity to the marketing world!




We only accept applications that are sent through LinkedIn.

  • Collaborate for Scalability: Work side-by-side with development teams to optimize the application performance, reliability, and scalability of our marketing analytics platform.
  • Ensure System Reliability: Actively participate in monitoring overall system health, analyzing metrics, and responding to incidents to minimize downtime.
  • Enforce Security Standards: Contribute to the integration and enforcement of security best practices across our deployment processes and cloud infrastructure.
  • Continuously Learn: Actively study and apply modern DevOps principles, tools, and methodologies in a fast-paced, real-world setting.


Requirements:

  • 0-2 years of experience in a DevOps or similar technical role
  • Basic understanding of cloud platforms (GCP preferred)
  • Familiarity with containerization technologies (e.g., Docker)
  • Knowledge of scripting languages (e.g., Python, Bash)
  • Basic understanding of version control systems (Git)
  • Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies
  • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
  • Excellent communication skills in English

Preferred:

  • Experience with Kubernetes or other container orchestration platforms
  • Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools
  • Basic understanding of networking concepts
  • Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code tools (e.g., Terraform)


Why us?

  • We are a young Amsterdam-based tech company with smart, educated people who have a passion for their field of expertise.
  • We are output-driven, which creates freedom and responsibility.
  • An opportunity to implement our cutting-edge solution used by industry-leading clients to optimise large marketing investments.
  • A place within a team of young experts that learn from each other.
  • The chance to work at a fast-growing company with a unique mix of local and international clients.


What we offer (Objective Perks):

  • A competitive salary based on your experience.
  • 25 holiday days per year (based on a full-time contract) as well as a day of Celebration Leave, which can be used to celebrate events not covered by the Dutch public holidays.
  • A great pension plan with NN.
  • A generous annual personal development budget and a training budget.
  • A mobility allowance (if you live more than 10km away from the office).
  • A health and wellness benefit in the form of company discounted subscriptions to ClassPass.
  • A positive, encouraging work environment with an open/flat culture.
  • A team of smart, young, motivated and ambitious colleagues to work alongside you.
  • An international environment, diverse with 15+ nationalities.
  • A daily healthy lunch at the office for a small monthly contribution.
  • A flexible approach to working facilitated through hybrid working.
  • Regular social activities and an annual weekend trip (in the past we have gone skiing, sailing and surfing).


Ready to shape the future of data-driven marketing? Apply now and be part of our journey to bring objectivity to the marketing world!


We only accept applications that are sent through LinkedIn.

Title: Online media analist
Description:
Op deze pagina:
